name: Cash in a Flash Pawn
description_short: Cash in a Flash Pawn is a Denver-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, used merchandise sales, and firearms inventory with flexible terms.
description_long: Cash in a Flash Pawn operates a physical pawn shop location in South Denver at 1842 S Parker Rd, serving the Denver metro area with traditional pawn services. The company accepts personal items as collateral for short-term loans, including watches, jewelry, tools, and other valuables, providing quick access to cash without credit checks. Their business model combines collateral-based lending with retail sales of pawned and consigned merchandise, including a notable inventory of firearms and pistols. Customer testimonials highlight friendly staff, fair pricing on both loans and merchandise, and willingness to negotiate terms—with one customer reporting driving 30 minutes specifically to use this location over alternatives. The South Denver location operates Monday-Friday 9AM-7PM, Saturday 9AM-6PM, and is closed Sundays.
address: 313 S Wilcox St Ste A, Castle Rock, CO 80104

company_info.headquarters: 313 S Wilcox St Ste A, Castle Rock, CO 80104

pros: No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to customers with poor or no credit history
Fair valuation on collateral; customers report receiving unexpected value for old items like watches
Friendly and knowledgeable staff; multiple testimonials praise staff by name (James, Kiedra, manager)
Flexible terms and willingness to negotiate with customers on loan amounts and conditions
Diverse inventory beyond typical pawn goods—tools, watches, firearms, and other quality merchandise
Competitive pricing on used merchandise; customers report buying multiple items due to low prices
Customer loyalty indicating repeat business and willingness to drive distances to use this location
cons: Pawn loans require collateral and typically carry higher effective interest rates compared to traditional loans
Limited hours (closed Sundays; weekday closing at 7PM may not suit all schedules)
Physical location-dependent; requires in-person visit to conduct transactions
No transparent pricing or APR information available on website for loan terms
Risk of losing collateral if loan is not repaid within agreed timeframe
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history needing quick cash access
People with valuable items (watches, jewelry, tools) they're willing to temporarily part with for immediate funds
Shoppers seeking discounted used merchandise and collectibles like firearms
diagnosis: Cash in a Flash Pawn is best for consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable collateral and cannot qualify for traditional credit products. The main caveat is that pawn loans are expensive compared to bank loans and require surrendering personal property, making them a short-term emergency option rather than sustainable debt solution.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans for personal items
